emails.body: Daren, I just talked to Mary and she said that they developed the meter 987341 for the meters that you had nominated under the 987012. Under Aggregate 7012 is 4045; 6026; 6114; 6427; 6848; 9755 these should all be under the 987341. Do we need to renominate these meters or do I just move them in pops. Let me know Daren I aim to please I think that's a southern term!!)

emails.subject: Re: 987012
emails.body: Re: 987012 Tom, I changed the meter on deal 156161 from7012 to 7341. You will need to repath and renom this in MOPS. Also, you will need to make sure that the welhead meteres are linked to 7341 in POPS. Let me know if you have any questions. D Tom Acton@ENRON 02/09/2000 08:41 AM
